svg.text: Bounded hard + x_s smoothing: Lyapunov contraction ratio across rho
Each panel plots V_next_first / V_k against the run-specific rho line. Red markers indicate first-step contraction violations.
rho=0.95 | solver=95.00% | hard=94.95% | bounded-LS=1999 | y-max=1.02 | clipped=0
rho=0.98 | solver=99.85% | hard=99.85% | bounded-LS=510 | y-max=1.04 | clipped=14
